ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the individual (1: male, 0: female) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Native country of the individual */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the individual */,
  "veteran_status" TEXT /* Veteran status of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_data_collection_method FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method") REFERENCES data_collection_method ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclass" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Workclass of the individual */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight of the individual */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of employment */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (full-time, part-time, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the individual */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  "highest_degree" TEXT /* Highest degree obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_status" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children */,
  "marital_status_date" TEXT /* Date when the marital status was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupation" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the individual */,
  "job_level" TEXT /* Job level (entry-level, mid-level, senior-level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationship" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the individual */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Household size */,
  "household_type" TEXT /* Household type (nuclear, extended, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capital_gain" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the individual */,
  "gain_year" INTEGER /* Year the gain was recorded */,
  "gain_source" TEXT /* Source of the gain (stocks, real estate, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capital_loss" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the individual */,
  "loss_year" INTEGER /* Year the loss was recorded */,
  "loss_source" TEXT /* Source of the loss (stocks, real estate, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hours_per_week" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week by the individual */,
  "average_hours_per_year" INTEGER /* Average hours worked per week over the past year */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Job type (part-time, full-time, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Income of the individual */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Source of income (salary, self-employment, etc.) */,
  "income_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of income (monthly, annually, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_method" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metadata" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_metadata_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_method ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versioning" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the changes were made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versioning_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES dataset_metadata ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_usage" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of data usage */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (view, download, analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_management ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES dataset_metadata ("id")
)
